name: Banana Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 box (4 servings) instant vanilla pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the condensed milk, water, and pudding mix in a bowl.
2. Chill the mixture for 5 minutes.
3. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the whipped cream into the pudding mixture.
5. In a serving dish or glass, layer the pudding mixture, sliced bananas, and vanilla wafers, starting with the pudding layer on top.
6. Crush some of the vanilla wafers and sprinkle them on top.
7. Chill before serving.
